claims.summary: Adjacent artifact removals could create a new token and cause second-order stripping.
claims.disposition: Verified the single-pass longest-raw-match scanner never rescans created text, with an explicit regression test.

claims.summary: A symbol run of eight should fail the dialogue quality gate.
claims.disposition: Verified quality-gate regression coverage preserves the punctuation-rich allowance while rejecting excessive runs.

claims.summary: History compression should cap recent exchanges and scale truncation safely.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded recent-history selection and saturating trim calculations; no out-of-range slice is used.

claims.summary: Preview logging must not split multibyte UTF-8 characters.
claims.disposition: Verified all preview slices use str::floor_char_boundary and multibyte boundary coverage remains safe.
